description: Our 2016 Tesla Model X 90D AWD presented in stylish Deep Blue Metallic offers awesome performance and innovative technology that will make you look forward to every drive. Motivated by Dual Electric Motors and a 90kWh battery producing a combined 417hp coupled to a 1 Speed Automatic transmission to propel you to 60mph in around 5 seconds. This incredible All Wheel Drive SUV provides an estimated driving range of nearly 257 miles, responsive handling, a comfortable ride, and aerodynamic styling accented by a panoramic sunroof, LED headlamps, power Falcon-wing rear doors, an automatic power-deployable spoiler, and multi-spoke turbine alloy wheels.  Our Model X 90D's interior is sure to have you looking for every excuse to drive, thanks to a variety of amenities and technologies designed to improve your life. Heated front seats, a multi-function steering wheel, keyless entry/ignition, and dual-zone automatic climate control are just a few niceties available at your fingertips. Additionally, our Tesla's full-color instrument panel and touchscreen infotainment system features navigation, Bluetooth®, premium audio, an internet browser, and much more to keep you on course and entertained.  Our Tesla includes a backup camera, rain-sensing wipers, ABS, stability/traction control, and advanced airbags for your peace of mind. You will love our Model X 90D's incredible blend of capability and performance! Save this Page and Call for Availability. It's not often you find just the vehicle you are looking for AND with low mileage. This is your chance to take home a pre-owned and barely driven Nissan Frontier. The Nissan Frontier PRO-4X will provide you with everything you have always wanted in a car -- Quality, Reliability, and Character. More information about the 2016 Nissan Frontier: The Nissan Frontier is one of the lowest-priced pickups available. Four-cylinder Frontier models are more than capable of light-duty hauling and towing, while V6 models are the way to go for those with serious towing in mind. In any variant, the Frontier is more maneuverable and easier to park than full-size pickups, yet Crew Cab models have enough space for four adults. Compared to other small trucks the Frontier line still offers some innovative storage features, such as removable rear-seat storage boxes and the Utili-Track adjustable tie-down system. Off-road purists will also like the complete set of go-anywhere equipment and interior comforts of the PRO-4X models. description: Discover the exceptional performance and premium features of this stunning 2016 Audi S5 3.0T Premium Plus quattro. description: **2016 Honda Accord LX w/Honda Sensing - Description**  The 2016 Honda Accord LX with Honda Sensing is a well-rounded sedan that combines reliability, efficiency, and advanced safety features. Powered by a 2.4L I4 engine, it delivers 185 horsepower and 181 ft-lbs of torque, ensuring a smooth and responsive driving experience. With less than 71,000 miles on the odometer, averaging under 8,000 miles per year, this vehicle is in excellent overall condition and has been meticulously maintained by its one previous owner.  This Accord is equipped with a host of factory-default features designed for comfort and convenience. Inside, you'll find a spacious cabin with comfortable seating for five, a user-friendly infotainment system featuring a 7-inch touchscreen display, Bluetooth connectivity for hands-free calling and audio streaming, and a rearview camera for enhanced visibility while reversing.  The Honda Sensing suite of safety features includes adaptive cruise control, collision mitigation braking system, lane keeping assist, and road departure mitigation, all of which work together to enhance your driving confidence. Additionally, the Accord LX comes with keyless entry, a power-adjustable driver's seat, and a multi-angle rearview camera, making every trip more enjoyable.  Fuel efficiency is another highlight of this model, achieving an impressive 27 MPG in the city and 37 MPG on the highway, making it an economical choice for daily commuting or long drives. With its clean CARFAX report, you can trust that this vehicle has a solid history and is ready for many more miles ahead.  ---  **2016 Honda Accord LX w/Honda Sensing - Descripción**  El Honda Accord LX 2016 con Honda Sensing es una berlina bien equilibrada que combina fiabilidad, eficiencia y características avanzadas de seguridad. Impulsado por un motor I4 de 2.4L, ofrece 185 caballos de fuerza y 181 lb-pie de torque, asegurando una experiencia de conducción suave y receptiva. Con menos de 71,000 millas en el odómetro, promediando menos de 8,000 millas por año, este vehículo se encuentra en excelentes condiciones generales y ha sido mantenido meticulosamente por su único propietario anterior.  Este Accord está equipado con una variedad de características predeterminadas de fábrica diseñadas para la comodidad y conveniencia. En el interior, encontrará una cabina espaciosa con asientos cómodos para cinco personas, un sistema de infoentretenimiento fácil de usar con una pantalla táctil de 7 pulgadas, conectividad Bluetooth para llamadas manos libres y transmisión de audio, y una cámara de reversa para mejorar la visibilidad al retroceder.  El conjunto de características de seguridad Honda Sensing incluye control de crucero adaptativo, sistema de frenado por mitigación de colisiones, asistencia para mantenerse en el carril y mitigación de salida de carretera, todos los cuales trabajan juntos para aumentar su confianza al conducir. Además, el Accord LX cuenta con entrada sin llave, un asiento del conductor ajustable eléctricamente y una cámara de reversa de múltiples ángulos, haciendo que cada viaje sea más placentero.  La eficiencia de combustible es otro punto destacado de este modelo, logrando un impresionante 27 MPG en la ciudad y 37 MPG en la carretera, lo que lo convierte en una opción económica para el transporte diario o viajes largos. description: The 2016 BMW M235i Convertible blends open-air freedom with true BMW M Performance engineering, delivering a driving experience thats both thrilling and refined. Finished in Estoril Blue Metallic, its bold and athletic stance is perfectly complemented by 18-inch double-spoke Orbit Gray wheels (Style 436M), signaling the power and precision that lie beneath the surface. Inside, the cabin is crafted in Oyster Dakota leather upholstery, balancing sport and sophistication with fine materials and meticulous detailing. Every element is designed around the driver, from the intuitive controls to the cockpits elegant layout. Performance meets practicality through a collection of well-equipped packages. The Cold Weather Package adds a heated steering wheel, heated front seats, and retractable headlight washers for comfort and convenience in any climate. The Driver Assistance Package provides confidence behind the wheel with a rearview camera and Park Distance Control, ensuring easy maneuvering in tight spaces. Technology takes center stage with the Technology Package, featuring navigation, BMW Online & Apps, real-time traffic updates, and an instrument cluster with extended contents  keeping you seamlessly connected and informed on every drive. Under the hood, the 3.0-liter M Performance TwinPower Turbo inline-6 delivers 320 horsepower through a precision-tuned rear-wheel-drive platform, combining agility, balance, and unmistakable M character. The 2016 BMW M235i Convertible isnt just a top-down coupe  its a celebration of performance, luxury, and the pure joy of driving.

description: Discover the exceptional 2017 Lexus RX 350, a sophisticated and versatile luxury crossover that seamlessly blends style, performance, and advanced technology. This meticulously maintained vehicle, with its striking Blue exterior, is a true standout on the road.  Boasting an impressive array of features, the 2017 Lexus RX 350 is designed to elevate your driving experience. Highlights include:   9 Speakers  AM/FM radio: SiriusXM  CD player  Air Conditioning with Automatic Temperature Control  Power Driver Seat  Steering Wheel Mounted Audio Controls  Four Wheel Independent Suspension  Traction Control  ABS Brakes  Dual Front Impact and Side Airbags  Power Liftgate  Backup Monitor  Auto High-Beam Headlights  Leather-Wrapped Steering Wheel  Powered by a robust 3.5L V6 DOHC 24V engine and an 8-Speed Automatic transmission, the RX 350 delivers a smooth and responsive driving experience with an impressive fuel efficiency of 20 city/27 highway MPG. The refined handling and four-wheel independent suspension ensure a confident and comfortable ride, whether navigating city streets or winding country roads.  Step inside the well-appointed cabin and you'll be surrounded by thoughtful amenities that cater to your every need. The spacious and versatile interior offers ample room for passengers and cargo, with a split-folding rear seat and a power liftgate for easy access. Luxurious NuLuxe seating, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, and an advanced infotainment system with a 12-speaker premium audio system create an exceptional driving environment.  Safety is a top priority in the 2017 Lexus RX 350, with a comprehensive suite of advanced driver-assistance technologies, including a Backup Monitor, Blind Spot Monitoring, and Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, providing you with added peace of mind on the road.  This meticulously maintained 2017 Lexus RX 350 represents an exceptional value in the luxury crossover market. description: 2017 Chevrolet Equinox LT Sport Utility 4D for Sale in Fontana, CALooking for a reliable, stylish, and feature-packed SUV? The 2017 Chevrolet Equinox LT Sport Utility 4D is the perfect choice for your next vehicle. Available now at American Fleet in Fontana, San Bernardino, California, this SUV combines modern technology, exceptional comfort, and outstanding performance. Whether you're commuting through the city streets or embarking on a weekend adventure, the 2017 Chevrolet Equinox has everything you need to make every drive enjoyable.Performance and Efficiency: The 2017 Chevrolet Equinox DeliversUnder the hood, the 2017 Chevrolet Equinox LT features a powerful yet fuel-efficient 2.4-liter 4-cylinder engine. Paired with an automatic 6-speed transmission with overdrive, this SUV ensures smooth acceleration and seamless gear shifts for a confident driving experience. The front-wheel-drive (FWD) system provides excellent handling and stability, making it a great choice for both city driving and highway cruising. With its combination of performance and efficiency, the Equinox is designed to keep you moving without breaking the bank at the pump.Stay Safe with Advanced Safety FeaturesSafety is a top priority in the 2017 Chevrolet Equinox LT Sport Utility 4D. Equipped with a comprehensive suite of safety features, this SUV provides peace of mind for you and your passengers. The 4-wheel ABS and StabiliTrak stability control system work together to enhance braking performance and maintain control in challenging road conditions. Additional features like Traction Control, Hill Start Assist, and Rollover Protection ensure you stay secure no matter where your journey takes you.The Equinox also comes with a Backup Camera, making parking and reversing easier and safer. With Dual Air Bags, Front and Rear Head Curtain Air Bags, and Side Air Bags, the Equinox is well-equipped to protect everyone on board in the event of an accident. description: This 2018 Hyundai Elantra SEL has been fully serviced, inspected and detailed, so you can drive away in confidence, knowing you're getting a reliable vehicle in great shape. Disclaimer: Not all Vehicles qualify for the 6 month, 6,000 mile warranty. Terms and conditions apply. Please contact our dealership for more information and details.     Option Group 01  Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning. Rear collision warning - It has your back.  This system uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it alerts you so you can take steps to prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it.  Rear collision warning, a second set off eyes watching over you.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. Be sure to take note of all this vehicle has to offer:     Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear camera - Watching your back! description: Experience the ultimate adventure-ready SUV with the 2019 Jeep Compass Trailhawk. This impressive vehicle is a true off-road champion, built to conquer any terrain with its robust 4x4 capabilities. Boasting a powerful 2.4L I4 engine and a smooth-shifting 9-speed automatic transmission, the Compass Trailhawk delivers exceptional performance and efficiency, with an impressive 22 MPG in the city and 30 MPG on the highway.  Tailored for the outdoor enthusiast, this Compass Trailhawk comes equipped with a host of premium features, including:   Four-Wheel Drive  Cruise Control  Tow Package  Push-Button Start  USB/AUX Input  Sirius XM Radio  Android Auto  Apple CarPlay  Backup Camera  Bluetooth  Elevate your driving experience with the Compass Trailhawk's advanced technology and connectivity features. Stay connected on the go with seamless integration of your smartphone through Android Auto and Apple CarPlay, while the Uconnect 4 system with an 8.4-inch display puts all your entertainment and navigation controls at your fingertips.  Designed for both style and function, the Compass Trailhawk boasts a rugged yet refined exterior, with a distinctive Jeep grille, sleek body lines, and eye-catching 17-inch painted/bright aluminum wheels. Inside, the premium cloth and leather-trimmed bucket seats provide exceptional comfort and support, while the split-folding rear seat offers versatile cargo-carrying capabilities.  Safety is of the utmost importance, and the Compass Trailhawk delivers with a comprehensive suite of advanced safety features, including Dual Front Impact Airbags, Dual Front Side Impact Airbags, Knee Airbag, Electronic Stability Control, and the ParkView Rear Back-Up Camera for added peace of mind.  Whether you're tackling the great outdoors or navigating the urban jungle, the 2019 Jeep Compass Trailhawk is the perfect companion. description: The 2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 RST stands out as a powerful and versatile pickup truck designed to meet the demands of both work and leisure. With a sleek Silver Ice Metallic exterior, this used model combines rugged durability with modern style. Powered by a robust 5.3-liter V8 engine delivering 355 horsepower and 383 lb-ft of torque, it offers impressive towing capacity and reliable performance. Equipped with a 4X4 drive train, the Silverado is ready for challenging terrains, making it an ideal choice for outdoor adventures or tough jobsites. Inside, the truck comfortably seats six passengers across four doors, providing ample space for family or team members. Its user-friendly technology features include Apple CarPlay, a backup camera, Bluetooth connectivity, keyless entry, push-start ignition, and a WiFi hotspot, ensuring you stay connected and entertained on the go.This Silverado 1500 RST is not only about power and convenience but also prioritizes safety and entertainment. It comes with essential security features such as a rear seat reminder, four-wheel ABS, auto-locking power door locks, anti-lockout functionality, and a programmable safety key, offering peace of mind every time you hit the road. The trucks advanced infotainment system boasts an 8-inch touchscreen display, integrating a radio with a touch screen interface and compatibility with myChevrolet Connected Access for smart device app integration. It supports hands-free voice-operated calling, along with electronic messaging assistance that reads messages aloud and allows voice control. The sound system includes six speakers, complemented by auxiliary audio inputs for USB and iPod/iPhone devices, delivering crisp audio quality for all your journeys.2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Safety and Security FeaturesThe Silverado 1500 prioritizes driver and passenger safety with features like a rear seat reminder to prevent accidental leaving of children or valuable items, and four-wheel anti-lock braking system (ABS) for enhanced control in emergency situations. Power door locks include anti-lockout functions and auto-locking capability to secure the vehicle when needed, while a programmable safety key adds an extra layer of security by restricting access to the vehicles functions, making this truck a dependable choice for both daily driving and heavy-duty use.2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Entertainment and Technology FeaturesEquipped with an 8-inch infotainment touchscreen, this Silverado offers seamless access to music, navigation, and connectivity options. The system supports myChevrolet Connected Access, allowing compatibility with smart device apps, and facilitates hands-free voice-operated phone calls and electronic messaging, enhancing convenience and safety. The six-speaker audio system ensures an immersive listening experience, while auxiliary inputs via USB and iPod/iPhone provide additional options for connecting your favorite devices. The integrated app marketplace further expands entertainment possibilities, making this truck a hub for both work and leisure.2019 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 Performance FeaturesDesigned to deliver reliable power and adaptability, the Silverado 1500 features auto start/stop technology to improve fuel efficiency during idling, along with an electronic 4WD selector for easy terrain management. Its part-time 4WD system allows drivers to switch between two-wheel and four-wheel drive modes as needed, optimizing traction and control. description: Introducing the 2019 Hyundai KONA SE, a compact SUV that combines style, efficiency, and practicality in one exciting package. With its vibrant Pulse Red exterior and modern Gray/Black interior, the KONA SE stands out on the road while providing a comfortable and functional driving experience. This vehicle is powered by a robust Nu 2.0L I4 engine, generating an impressive 147 horsepower and 132 ft-lbs of torque. Whether youre navigating busy city streets or hitting the open highway, the KONA delivers a spirited performance that makes every drive enjoyable.  **Exterior Features:** The striking Pulse Red finish of the KONA SE not only adds a touch of flair but also features a durable, high-quality paint that resists the elements, ensuring your vehicle looks great for years to come. The exterior design is bold and dynamic, highlighted by Hyundai's signature cascading grille and sleek LED daytime running lights that provide excellent visibility while enhancing the vehicle's sporty character. The compact dimensions make it easy to maneuver in urban environments, while the 16-inch alloy wheels add an extra touch of sophistication. The KONA SE also comes with roof rails, providing additional versatility for your adventures, whether you're loading up for a weekend getaway or just need extra space for your gear.  **Interior Comfort and Technology:** Step inside the KONA SE, and youll be greeted by a thoughtfully designed cabin that prioritizes comfort and functionality. The Gray/Black interior features high-quality materials and an ergonomic layout that ensures both driver and passengers enjoy a pleasant ride. The supportive front seats are designed for comfort on long trips, while the rear seats offer ample legroom and headroom for your passengers. The rear seats can also be folded down to expand the cargo area, making it easy to transport larger items.  In terms of technology, the KONA SE is equipped with a user-friendly 7-inch touchscreen display that serves as the hub for your infotainment needs. It includes Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility, allowing you to seamlessly integrate your smartphone for access to your favorite apps, navigation, and music directly from the touchscreen. The vehicle also features a rearview camera, providing added safety and convenience when reversing or parking.  For your audio enjoyment, the KONA SE comes with a six-speaker audio system that delivers crisp sound quality, perfect for your daily commute or weekend road trips. Additional convenience features include Bluetooth hands-free phone capability, steering wheel-mounted audio controls, and a USB port for charging your devices on the go.  **Performance and Efficiency:** Under the hood, the Nu 2.0L I4 engine is paired with a six-speed automatic transmission, providing a smooth and responsive driving experience. With a fuel efficiency rating of 27 MPG in the city and 33 MPG on the highway, the KONA SE is designed to save you money at the pump while still offering an enjoyable drive. Whether youre commuting to work or heading out on a long-distance trip, you can count on the KONA to deliver the efficiency you need without sacrificing performance.  **Safety Features:** Safety is a top priority in the 2019 Hyundai KONA SE, which comes equipped with a variety of advanced safety features to give you peace of mind on every journey. Standard features include a suite of airbags, electronic stability control, traction control, and a tire pressure monitoring system. The KONA SE also offers available options such as a blind-spot monitoring system and rear cross-traffic alert, providing additional layers of security and awareness on the road.  **Overall Condition:** This particular 2019 Hyundai KONA SE is in excellent overall condition, with a clean CARFAX report that assures you of its well-maintained history. With only a few miles on the odometer, this vehicle looks and drives like new, ready for many more adventures ahead. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. description: Unleash your inner explorer. This isn't just a truck; it's the legendary 2020 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road, engineered to conquer the toughest trails and dominate the concrete jungle. Ready to turn every drive into an adventure, this is the midsize pickup that redefines rugged capability with a thrilling blend of power, advanced technology, and unmistakable style.  Beneath the hood, the robust 3.5L V6 engine delivers a potent 278 horsepower, perfectly paired with the battle-tested TRD Off-Road Tuned Suspension and Bilstein shocks that effortlessly soak up the roughest terrain. When the trail gets intense, engage the standard Electronically Controlled Locking Rear Differential, Crawl Control (CRAWL), and Multi-Terrain Select (MTS) to navigate mud, sand, and rock with surgical precision.   The aggressive, trail-ready stance is complemented by key modern features. Stay connected and in command with the upgraded 8-inch touchscreen display featuring Apple CarPlay and Android Auto compatibility. For peace of mind, the truck comes standard with the Toyota Safety Sense P (TSS-P) suite, including a Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert, and Dynamic Radar Cruise Control.  From its black overfenders to its powerful performance technology, this Tacoma is built for those who demand more.  Don't let this adventure-ready machine get awayclaim it today at the Visalia Hyundai! Recent Arrival!  This 2020 Silver Sky Metallic Toyota Tacoma TRD Offroad 4WD V6 is well equipped and includes these features and benefits:  One Owner, 120V/400W Deck Mounted AC Power, Active Cruise Control, Apple CarPlay/Android Auto, Blind Spot Monitor w/Rear Cross Traffic Alert, Exterior Parking Camera Rear, Front fog lights, Illuminated entry, Power Sliding Rear Window w/Privacy Glass, Rear Parking Assist Sonar, Remote keyless entry, Smart Key w/Push Button Start, Technology Package, TRD Off Road Package, Wheels: 16" x 7J Machined Contrast Alloy.   Excellent Selection of New, Certified Pre-Owned and Used Vehicles, Financing Options. Convenience Convenience is paramount for us as a dealership. We want to be convenient for our customers in every area of business. We start by being conveniently located right off of the 198 freeway in the heart of Hanford; just a short drive from both Fresno and Visalia. Additionally, we make sure to keep our team trained in our processes so that your visit won't be any longer than it needs to be. We believe buying a car should be a simple, fun and short process! Transparency Transparency is a really big deal to us. This is what really sets us apart from your typical dealer. We want our customers to feel happy about their purchase; in order for that to happen, we make sure you understand every step in the process and fully understand the details of your purchase. After all, buying a car is no small decision, and you have every right to have all of your questions answered and your concerns addressed until you are satisfied. We completely understand this, and it is our goal for you to leave our store with a pep in your step and feeling REALLY good about your purchase. description: 2020 Mini Cooper John Cooper Works Coupe finished with a Midnight Black Metallic exterior and Carbon Black leather interior. Driven 68,425 careful miles since new. This Mini Cooper John Cooper Works had an original list price of $43,600. Options include 17 Inch JCW Track Spoke Black Alloy Wheels, Cooper S Sport Seats, Mini Yours Lounge Leather Seats, Iconic Trim, Touchscreen Navigation Package, Chili Red Roof and Mirror Caps, SiriusXM Satellite Radio, Harman/Kardon Premium Sound System, Heated Front Seats, Mini Head Up Display and much more. This Mini Cooper JCW Coupe just underwent a complete oil and fluid service within the last 20 miles and it drives even better than it looks. The 4 cylinder engine is strong and powerful and the 8-speed automatic transmission shifts effortlessly through all of the gears. The steering is tight and precise and the brakes feel just great. All of the electronics work perfectly and the air conditioning is ice cold. This really is a fantastic Mini JCW to drive. The interior is stunning. The Carbon Black leather sport seats are in remarkable condition (see pictures) showing just minimal wear to the seats. The dashboard is like new (looks great with the factory navigation system) and even the carpets don't look or feel like they have been stepped on thanks to the Mini floor mats that have been protecting them. The exterior is what really sets this particular Mini Cooper JCW apart from the rest. The Midnight Black Metallic paint is in fantastic condition (see pictures) with no major scratches or dings anywhere at all. The paint is bright and shiny with plenty of luster. Add the optional JCW Track Spoke Black Alloy wheels mounted on great tires and this Mini really does look special. The 2020 Mini Cooper JCW Coupe really is the ultimate throwback car to another era. It has iconic looks, fantastic performance, plenty of interior room along with all of Mini's legendary safety, craftsmanship and reliability. The only real apologies to this Mini JCW are a few typical nicks and chips (see pictures) that are to be expected on any used car. description: *"DISCOVER CONFIDENCE, COMFORT, AND CAPABILITY IN THIS SUPER WHITE 2020 TOYOTA RAV4 XLE---READY FOR CHICAGO ROADS!"****ONLY 44,175 MILES*****FULLY SERVICED - 135 POINT INSPECTION***2020 Toyota RAV4 XLE: **Super White/Light Gray*If you're searching for a dependable, stylish, and efficient used SUV near you, this 2020 Toyota RAV4 XLE is an outstanding choice. Finished in a crisp Super White exterior with a clean and modern Light Gray interior, this RAV4 delivers the perfect balance of versatility, technology, and everyday comfort. With only 44,175 miles, it has been gently driven and is ready to provide years of reliable ownership for drivers throughout Morton Grove, IL and the greater Chicagoland area.Performance & EfficiencyThe 2020 Toyota RAV4 XLE is powered by a responsive 2.5L 4-cylinder engine paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission, delivering smooth acceleration and impressive fuel efficiency. Whether you're commuting from Skokie to downtown Chicago, cruising through Evanston, or heading out to Schaumburg, this RAV4 offers confident performance and excellent gas mileage that helps you save at the pump. Its balanced handling makes it ideal for navigating tight city streets, open highways, and suburban roads alike.Safety FeaturesToyota is known for safety, and this RAV4 XLE is equipped with Toyota Safety Sense, including advanced driver-assist technologies such as a pre-collision system with pedestrian detection, lane departure alert with steering assist, adaptive cruise control, lane tracing assist, and automatic high beams. These features help keep you and your passengers protected whether you're driving in heavy Chicago traffic, snowy winter conditions, rainy spring days, or bright summer sunshine.Comfort & ConvenienceInside, the Light Gray interior provides a welcoming and spacious cabin with premium materials and thoughtful design. Enjoy features like a power-adjustable driver's seat, dual-zone automatic climate control, keyless entry with push-button start, and a user-friendly infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. description: LUNAR BLUE METALLIC No Accidents!   Important Package and Feature Information   Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot.  Come on in to Sears Imported Autos today at 13500 Wayzata Blvd Minnetonka MN 55305 or call 952-546-5301 to schedule a test drive! description: This 2020 Ford F-150 Raptor SuperCrew 4x4 is one eye-catching machine that looks as good as it drives. Finished in the sharp Lead Foot Gray exterior with an aggressive Raptor front end, this truck stands out anywhere it goes. The black leather Raptor interior gives it a clean, tough look thats built for comfort and control. Under the hood, its powered by the 3.5-liter EcoBoost high-output V6 engine paired with an electronic 10-speed automatic transmission with tow mode, giving it smooth shifting and strong power for any job or adventure. This Raptor was built to perform, offering serious off-road capability with features designed to handle the toughest terrain. It comes with FOX Live Valve shocks and selectable drive modes that let you switch between normal, sport, tow/haul, deep snow/sand, and off-road with just a turn of the dial. The 4x4 shift-on-the-fly system, skid plates, and Trail Control technology keep you steady and confident no matter where the roador trailtakes you. On the outside, this Raptor shows off its signature Raptor-style front bumper, dual exhaust with chrome tailpipes, and wide wheel lip moldings. The 17-inch forged aluminum wheels wrapped in LT315/70R17 all-terrain tires give it that aggressive stance and traction for any surface. The running boards are cast aluminum, making it easy to climb in and out, while the LED headlights, fog lamps, and LED side-mirror spotlights light up the path ahead with a clear, bright view. This truck isnt just about looksits built for function too. The power tailgate with step makes loading and unloading simple, while BoxLink tie-downs and LED box lighting help organize your gear. The large 36-gallon fuel tank means longer drives between stops, and the trailer sway control and integrated trailer brake controller make towing safe and easy. Whether youre hauling equipment or heading off-road, this Raptor is ready to work and play. Inside the cabin, youll find comfort and control at every touch. The interior features a leather-wrapped steering wheel, heated steering wheel, dual-zone electronic climate control, and heated front and rear seats. The Raptor-branded floor mats, carbon fiber interior trim, and Raptor-unique center stack give the cabin a bold, sporty look. Power-adjustable pedals, power windows and locks, and a power-sliding rear window add convenience to every trip. Technology is front and center in this truck. The SYNC®3 infotainment system with an 8-inch touchscreen brings Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, voice-activated navigation, and SiriusXM radio right to your fingertips. Youll enjoy the crystal-clear sound from the B&O premium sound system while staying connected with FordPass Connect and 4G Wi-Fi hotspot capability. The 360-degree camera system and Pro Trailer Backup Assist make parking and towing easier than ever before. When it comes to safety, this Raptor has you covered. It includes AdvanceTrac® with Roll Stability Control®, BLIS® with Trailer Tow Monitoring, Pre-Collision Assist with Automatic Emergency Braking, and a full airbag system with Safety Canopy®. The inflatable rear safety belts add extra protection, and the SecuriCode keyless entry keypad makes getting in and out quick and easy. The Raptor also includes the Twin Panel Moonroof that brings in plenty of sunlight and fresh air, along with the Raptor Carbon Fiber Package that gives the interior a sporty edge. The Torsen front differential and electronic locking rear axle with a 4.10 ratio give you traction when you need it most, while adaptive cruise control with stop-and-go keeps long drives comfortable and controlled. This clean and fully serviced 2020 Ford F-150 Raptor is ready to turn heads wherever it goes. From the city streets to the open desert, it delivers strength, style, and comfort all in one incredible truck. Its the kind of ride that stands out for its looks and backs it up with real performance. At Unique Trucks, the price you see is the price you payno hidden markups, no addendums, just honest pricing. We also offer our No Obligation Delivery service, where this Raptor can be delivered right to your doorstep. Test drive it from the comfort of your own home, make your best deal over the phone, and if you dont like it, you dont buy it. description: 2020 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road 4WD Double Cab | V6 | Super White | Black Interior  Experience legendary durability, off-road capability, and everyday versatility in this 2020 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road 4WD Double Cab, now available at our Land Rover dealership in Livermore, California. Power comes from a proven 3.5L V6 engine producing 278 horsepower, paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission. The 4WD system, combined with Toyotas TRD Off-Road engineering, delivers exceptional traction and control whether navigating trails, job sites, or changing road conditions. With approximately 46,355 miles, this Tacoma offers outstanding value in one of the most sought-after midsize truck segments.  Notable Features & Equipment:   TRD Off-Road Package  4WD with Active Traction Control (A-TRAC)  TRD-Tuned Off-Road Suspension with Bilstein Shocks  Electronically Controlled Locking Rear Differential  Crawl Control & Multi-Terrain Select  Hill Start Assist Control & Downhill Assist Control  Tow Package with Engine Oil Cooler, Power Steering Cooler, and Trailer Sway Control  16-Inch Machined Contrast Alloy Wheels  Spare Tire Lock  Technology & Interior:   Fabric-Trimmed Seats with Power Driver Seat  Smart Key System with Push-Button Start  Entune Audio with Touchscreen Display  Apple CarPlay & Android Auto Compatibility  Bluetooth Hands-Free Calling and Audio Streaming  USB Media Ports  Rearview Camera  Automatic Climate Control  Safety & Driver Assistance:   Toyota Safety Sense P (TSS-P)  Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection  Dynamic Radar Cruise Control  Lane Departure Alert  Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert  Vehicle Stability Control & Traction Control  Advanced Airbag System  Exterior & Utility Highlights:   Double Cab Configuration  All-Weather Floor Liners  Alloy Wheel Locks  Truck Bed Rail System  Durable Composite Bed  If youre searching for a Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road, a 4WD midsize truck, or a reliable adventure-ready pickup in Livermore, CA, this Tacoma delivers proven capability, long-term dependability, and excellent resale value.  Buy With Confidence  We are a trusted Land Rover dealership located in Livermore, California, proudly serving the Tri-Valley, Bay Area, and customers nationwide. Every pre-owned vehicle is carefully inspected for quality, reliability, and overall condition, ensuring confidence with every purchase.  Nationwide Sales Available  Not located in California? No problem. We regularly complete out-of-state transactions and can assist with remote paperwork, financing options, and vehicle delivery to buyers in any state. Our experienced team makes purchasing simple and transparent, no matter where youre located. This gasoline-powered sedan is equipped with a potent 8-speed shiftable automatic transmission, providing a seamless and exhilarating driving experience. With its sleek and sporty design, the M340i is sure to turn heads wherever you go. Under the hood, you'll find a powerful 3.0-liter inline 6-cylinder engine, delivering an impressive 382 horsepower and 369 lb-ft of torque. This means you can go from 0 to 60 mph in just 4.2 seconds, making it one of the fastest sedans in its class. Step inside the M340i and you'll be greeted with a luxurious and spacious interior. Premium leather seats, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, and ambient lighting create a sophisticated and comfortable environment. The 10.25-inch touchscreen display and digital instrument cluster provide easy access to the latest technology, including navigation, Apple CarPlay, and Android Auto. But the M340i isn't just about luxury and performance, it also prioritizes safety. With features like automatic emergency braking, lane departure warning, and adaptive cruise control, you can drive with confidence and peace of mind. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. description: Jaguar Land Rover Rancho Mirage is delighted to showcase, this Pre-Owned 2020 Chevrolet Equinox Premier 1.5T FWD Dressed in a refined Silver Ice Metallic exterior and with just 49,212 miles to its name, this SUV delivers an impressive balance of comfort, safety technology, and everyday versatility in a well-appointed package.   The Equinox Premier presents a confident and modern design, enhanced by 18-inch Aluminum Wheels, LED Headlamps with IntelliBeam, and Front Fog Lamps that elevate both style and visibility. Exterior conveniences such as a Hands-Free Power Liftgate, Remote Vehicle Start, and Luggage Rack Side Rails make this Equinox as practical as it is attractive.       Step inside and the Jet Black Leather-Appointed Interior welcomes you with a premium feel and thoughtful design. Heated front seats, dual-zone automatic climate control, and an 8-way power drivers seat with lumbar support ensure comfort on every drive. The cabin is further enhanced by wireless device charging, a color driver information display, and intuitive connectivity features designed to simplify daily life.    Engine and Performance: Under the hood is a capable 1.5-liter turbocharged DOHC 4-cylinder engine, producing 170 horsepower and 203 lb-ft of torque. Paired with a smooth 6-speed automatic transmission, this powertrain delivers confident acceleration, efficient performance, and a composed ride well-suited for both city driving and highway cruising.     Key Features:     Premier Trim: The top-tier Equinox configuration offering premium comfort, technology, and safety features.    Advanced Safety Suite: Includes Lane Keep Assist, Forward Collision Alert, Automatic Emergency Braking, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, and Blind Zone Alert for added peace of mind.    Wireless Device Charging: Keeps your compatible devices powered without the clutter of cables.    Hands-Free Power Liftgate: Enhances convenience when loading and unloading cargo.    Cargo Package: Includes a retractable cargo shade and cargo net for added organization and protection.    Black Bowtie Emblems: A subtle styling upgrade that adds a distinctive finishing touch.     This 2020 Chevrolet Equinox Premier 1.5T is far more than just a compact SUV; it is a well-rounded vehicle designed to deliver comfort, safety, and efficiency with ease. Available at Jaguar Land Rover Rancho Mirage, this vehicle represents an outstanding opportunity to enjoy premium features and everyday usability at exceptional value.         Jaguar Land Rover Rancho Mirage is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. We specialize in reliable used cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans for every budget and lifestyle. Whether you're looking for an affordable commuter car, a family-friendly SUV, a fuel-efficient hybrid, or a powerful pickup, we have options you can depend on.  At Ricart Chevrolet Buick GMC, we focus on customer satisfaction, transparent pricing, and hassle-free financing. Every vehicle is inspected, cleaned, and road-ready, ensuring you drive away with confidence. We work with all credit types, offering easy financing solutions, low down payments, and flexible terms.  Serving customers in Columbus and surrounding communities, we're proud to be a top-rated used car dealership known for honest service and dependable vehicles. Browse our inventory online or visit us today for a test drive!  This 2020 GMC Terrain SLE is a versatile and well-equipped SUV that's ready to take on your daily adventures. Featuring a spacious interior, efficient powertrain, and a wealth of advanced technology, this Terrain is the perfect blend of practicality and style. The front-wheel-drive configuration provides confident handling and responsive performance, whether you're navigating city streets or exploring the open road.  Inside, the spacious cabin offers premium cloth seating, ample storage, and a wealth of advanced technology features. The 8-inch GMC Infotainment System with navigation, dual-zone automatic climate control, and heated front seats are just a few of the thoughtful amenities that will enhance your driving experience.  Safety is also a top priority, with features like the HD Rear Vision Camera, OnStar emergency communication system, and a suite of advanced airbags to give you and your passengers peace of mind on every journey.  With its attractive Satin Steel Metallic exterior, this 2020 GMC Terrain SLE is a standout in its class. description: This  2021 Honda Accord Sedan Sport, has a Crystal Black Pearl exterior and Black interior color with only 70,209 miles.  Stock Number U12306A. You can connect  with us by calling 855-881-1148.     No Accidents!    OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Safety and Security Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road.
